Notes: Owner name exists with a singleton A RRset. The UPDATE deletes a different exact A RR, leaving the owner name present if the delete is treated as a no-op. This exposes whether the server returns success or an error for absent exact-RR deletion.

Steps.Description: Delete an exact A RR that is not present, while the owner name exists and prerequisites assert the name is in use.

Steps.Name: j.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the original A RRset remains present after the UPDATE.
